import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000';class ApiClient{constructor(){this.client=void 0;this.token=null;this.client=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,timeout:20000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Request interceptor to add token
this.client.interceptors.request.use(config=>{if(this.token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${this.token}`;}return config;});// Response interceptor for error handling
this.client.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){// Token expired, redirect to login
window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(error);});}setToken(token){this.token=token;}// Users endpoints
getProfile(){return this.client.get('/api/users/profile');}updateProfile(data){return this.client.put('/api/users/profile',data);}getDashboard(userId){return this.client.get(`/api/users/${userId}/dashboard`);}// Skills endpoints
listSkills(category){return this.client.get('/api/skills',{params:{category}});}getUserSkills(userId){return this.client.get(`/skills/user/${userId}`);}getTrendingSkills(){let days=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:90;let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:20;return this.client.get('/skills/trending',{params:{days,limit}});}// Job trends
getJobTrends(industry){let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:10;return this.client.get('/jobs/trends',{params:{industry,limit}});}// Resume analysis
analyzeResume(resumeText){return this.client.post('/resume/analyze',{resume_text:resumeText});}// Predictions endpoints
predictNextRole(userId){return this.client.get(`/api/predictions/${userId}/role`);}getROIEstimates(userId){return this.client.get(`/api/predictions/${userId}/roi`);}getUserPredictions(userId){return this.client.get(`/api/predictions/${userId}/all`);}// Mentor endpoints
getMentorGuidance(userId){return this.client.get(`/mentor/${userId}/guidance`);}// Health check
getHealth(){return this.client.get('/health');}}export default new ApiClient();
